headline.text: L1 PECO pallet inventory fell to *72 pallets* against a 1,620 minimum — FTL delivery arrived but supply chain remains strained.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 hit critical low on PECO pallets (down to 72 from a 1,620 standard) before an FTL arrived midday. Construction tent on S2 developed a new hole at 10:24 and was sealed within minutes. S3 and Twist Wrap ran clean with routine ATP passes.
per_plant_summary.L2: L2 FFS went down at 07:43 for film tracking and a missing roll, back online by 08:14. ML2 dancing arm sensor caused a brief stop at 08:56; maintenance adjusted sensor position by 1mm and resolved it. ML3 ran steady with routine inventory adjustments.
per_plant_summary.L3: L3 ML1 metal detector rejected all test cards repeatedly throughout third and first shifts despite multiple maintenance visits and reports of electric current when removing trays — issue unresolved. ML1 also had a C6 belt tear (fixed by 08:38) and rice hopper vacuum failure (flap bent, fixed by 09:46). Truffle Line replaced two broken Cavanna sensors in 34 minutes. ML4 gondola went down twice, and cleaning crew found a damaged licking roller blade with possible metal shavings — QA did not collect samples.

closed_today.title: S2 construction tent hole — contamination risk
closed_today.summary: New hole discovered in S2 construction tent at 10:24 — sealed by maintenance within minutes, QA monitoring hourly.
closed_today.resolution_comment: Sealed by 10:31 MT — "Your good we're getting it done right now" — QA monitoring hourly.

closed_today.title: ML1 C6 belt tearing — piece found in tray
closed_today.summary: C6 belt found splitting with broken piece in tray at 03:16 — belt repositioned and tear repaired by maintenance, running properly as of 08:38.
closed_today.resolution_comment: Fixed by 08:38 MT — "The c6 belt is fixed" (Imperial)

closed_today.title: ML1 rice hopper vacuum failure — bent flap causing leak
closed_today.summary: Rice hopper vacuum not suctioning at 09:27 — maintenance tore down unit, found bent flap causing vacuum leak, fixed by 09:46.
closed_today.resolution_comment: Fixed by 09:46 MT — flap bent causing vacuum leak, maintenance tore down and repaired (Nathan Ruiz)

closed_today.title: Truffle Line Cavanna 1 speed sensors broken (B142, B141)
closed_today.summary: Both speed sensors on Cavanna 1 broken at 06:44 — maintenance replaced sensors and machine back online by 07:18, 34-minute stoppage.
closed_today.resolution_comment: Sensors replaced by 07:18 MT — "Cavanna 1 is now back in operation after replacing the sensors" (Nathan Ruiz)

closed_today.title: Truffle Line salt pallet mislabeled with two item numbers
closed_today.summary: Salt pallet had both 10001 and 10002 labels; IMS reviewed and corrected within 2 minutes.
closed_today.resolution_comment: Corrected by 07:39 MT — "we reviewed and corrected, thank you" (Fredy Montalvan)

closed_today.title: FFS film tracking issue with missing roll
closed_today.summary: FFS down at 07:43 for film tracking problems and missing roll — maintenance troubleshooting, back up by 08:14, 31-minute stoppage.
closed_today.resolution_comment: Back up at 08:14 MT — "Line is up and running" (Alan Todd)

closed_today.title: ML2 flow wrap dancing arm sensor fault
closed_today.summary: Dancing arm sensor caused line stop at 08:56 — maintenance adjusted sensor position up 1mm, resolved by 09:06.
closed_today.resolution_comment: Fixed by 09:06 MT — maintenance moved sensor up 1mm (Alan Todd)

opened_today.title: PECO pallet inventory at critical low — 72 available vs 1,620 minimum
opened_today.summary: PECO pallet count dropped to 72 (need 1,620 per standard) — one FTL delivered today but supply chain remains constrained and production at risk of line stoppages.

opened_today.title: S2 construction tent hole — contamination risk
opened_today.summary: New hole discovered in S2 construction tent at 10:24 — sealed by maintenance within minutes, QA monitoring hourly.

opened_today.title: ML1 metal detector rejecting all test cards — electric current present
opened_today.summary: Metal detector continuously rejecting all NFE/S/S test cards since 22:13 last night; operators report electric current when removing trays; maintenance inspected multiple times but issue persists as of 06:23 this morning.

opened_today.title: ML1 C6 belt tearing — piece found in tray
opened_today.summary: C6 belt found splitting with broken piece in tray at 03:16 — belt repositioned and tear repaired by maintenance, running properly as of 08:38.

opened_today.title: ML1 rice hopper vacuum failure — bent flap causing leak
opened_today.summary: Rice hopper vacuum not suctioning at 09:27 — maintenance tore down unit, found bent flap causing vacuum leak, fixed by 09:46.

opened_today.title: Truffle Line Cavanna 1 speed sensors broken (B142, B141)
opened_today.summary: Both speed sensors on Cavanna 1 broken at 06:44 — maintenance replaced sensors and machine back online by 07:18, 34-minute stoppage.

opened_today.title: Truffle Line duplicate chocolate pallet labels — wrong item numbers
opened_today.summary: Two identical labels found on different chocolate pallets that didn't match product in use — handed to IMS for resolution.

opened_today.title: Truffle Line salt pallet mislabeled with two item numbers
opened_today.summary: Salt pallet had both 10001 and 10002 labels; IMS reviewed and corrected within 2 minutes.

opened_today.title: ML4 licking roller blade damaged — possible metal shavings past cleaning station
opened_today.summary: Damaged blade found on cleaning roller 2 during startup at 03:51 with possible metal shavings past the rollers — QA did not collect samples, area cleaned manually.

opened_today.title: ML4 TG machines handed off in manual mode instead of auto
opened_today.summary: All TG machines received from second shift in manual mode rather than auto — switching to auto resolved issues, procedural gap in shift handoff.

opened_today.title: FFS film tracking issue with missing roll
opened_today.summary: FFS down at 07:43 for film tracking problems and missing roll — maintenance troubleshooting, back up by 08:14, 31-minute stoppage.

opened_today.title: ML2 flow wrap dancing arm sensor fault
opened_today.summary: Dancing arm sensor caused line stop at 08:56 — maintenance adjusted sensor position up 1mm, resolved by 09:06.

still_open.summary: PECO pallet count dropped to 72 (need 1,620 per standard) — one FTL delivered today but supply chain remains constrained and production at risk of line stoppages.
